name: ReUI Interactive Stepper
description: A polished multi-step wizard component featuring completed checkmarks, progress indicators, responsive layouts, and slide-in transition animations for active content panels.

name: Magic UI Animated Beam
description: An interactive diagram component displaying glowing inputs connected to a central server node using animated SVG path strokes.

name: Aceternity UI Text Generate Effect
description: A dynamic text typography component that splits copy by word boundaries and animates them with custom staggered delay transitions.
